{{Infobox character
| name = Rellask
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Rellask]] is a prince of [[Karosha]] and the son of [[Queen Shyrax]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Rellask]] is Shyrax's son.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Rellask]] is a Prince.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
